groep4-5.name: Lost & Found
structure: Character has or uses something important
Item goes missing and character becomes upset
Character searches in multiple places
Item is found or character learns it's not important
groep4-5.description: A child loses something meaningful and goes on a quest to find it, learning about persistence and accepting loss.

groep4-5.name: New Experience
structure: Character encounters something completely new
Initial fear or confusion about the new thing
Character tries it and discovers unexpected joy
Character embraces the new experience
groep4-5.description: A child tries something for the first time and discovers they enjoy it more than expected.

groep4-5.name: Problem Solving
structure: Character faces a practical problem
First attempt to solve it fails
Character tries a different approach
Problem is solved through persistence
groep4-5.description: A child encounters an obstacle and must think creatively to overcome it.

groep4-5.name: Helping Others
structure: Character notices someone in need
Character decides to help despite difficulty
Character takes action to assist
Character sees positive impact of their help
groep4-5.description: A child helps someone and learns the satisfaction of making a difference.

groep4-5.name: Learning a Lesson
structure: Character makes a mistake or poor choice
Character faces consequences of their action
Character reflects on what went wrong
Character makes better choices in future
groep4-5.description: A child learns from their mistakes through natural consequences.

groep4-5.name: Overcoming Fear
structure: Character is afraid of something specific
Character is encouraged to face the fear
Character confronts what frightens them
Character discovers fear was less scary than imagined
groep4-5.description: A child conquers a personal fear and gains new confidence.

groep4-5.name: Making Amends
structure: Character hurts or upsets someone
Character feels guilty about their action
Character apologizes and tries to make things right
Character and other person reconcile
groep4-5.description: A child learns to take responsibility and repair relationships.

groep5-6.name: Conflict Resolution
structure: Two characters have opposing needs or views
Conflict escalates due to miscommunication
Characters take time to understand each other
Characters find compromise or mutual understanding
groep5-6.description: Children learn to resolve disagreements through communication and empathy.

groep5-6.name: Mystery Solving
structure: Something puzzling or mysterious occurs
Character gathers clues and investigates
False leads distract from the solution
Mystery is solved through careful observation
groep5-6.description: A child becomes a detective and uses logic to solve a puzzle.

groep5-6.name: Responsibility Test
structure: Character is given responsibility for something important
Character is tempted to neglect the responsibility
Character must choose between easy and right path
Character proves their trustworthiness
groep5-6.description: A child demonstrates they can be trusted with something important.

groep5-6.name: Friendship Challenge
structure: Friendship is tested by external pressure or misunderstanding
Friends drift apart or argue
Both friends realize what they're losing
Friends work to strengthen their bond
groep5-6.description: A child learns that good friendships require effort and communication.

groep5-6.name: Discovering Talent
structure: Character tries something new or is encouraged to try
Character discovers unexpected ability
Character develops skill through practice
Character finds pride in their new talent
groep5-6.description: A child finds a hidden talent and pursues their passion.

groep5-6.name: Accepting Difference
structure: Character meets someone very different from them
Character initially judges or misunderstands
Character looks beyond surface differences
Character appreciates what makes others unique
groep5-6.description: A child learns to value people who are different from them.

groep5-6.name: Standing Up
structure: Character witnesses something unjust
Character is afraid to speak up
Character finds courage to say something
Character's action helps create change
groep5-6.description: A child learns to stand up for what they believe is right.

groep7-8.name: Moral Dilemma
structure: Character faces choice between two values they hold
Both options have real consequences
Character must examine their beliefs carefully
Character makes decision and accepts consequences
groep7-8.description: A teenager grapples with a complex ethical question without a clear right answer.

groep7-8.name: Perspective Shift
structure: Character holds a strong belief about something
Character encounters evidence that challenges belief
Character resists the new information
Character comes to see issue from new angle
groep7-8.description: A teenager's worldview expands as they encounter different perspectives.

groep7-8.name: Environmental Impact
structure: Character witnesses environmental damage or depletion
Character learns about wider consequences
Character feels helplessness or anger
Character discovers ways to make positive impact
groep7-8.description: A teenager learns about environmental issues and finds ways to contribute.

groep7-8.name: Media Literacy
structure: Character encounters compelling media message
Character initially accepts information at face value
Character analyzes source and bias of information
Character learns to think critically about media
groep7-8.description: A teenager learns to question media and think critically about information.

groep7-8.name: Identity & Belonging
structure: Character questions where they fit in and who they are
Character experiments with different identities
Character navigates conflict between different groups
Character develops authentic sense of self
groep7-8.description: A teenager explores their identity and finds where they belong.

groep7-8.name: Systemic Injustice
structure: Character experiences or witnesses systemic unfairness
Character initially feels it's personal or isolated
Character recognizes larger pattern of injustice
Character considers their role in system and response
groep7-8.description: A teenager recognizes systemic problems beyond individual actions.

groep7-8.name: Future Uncertainty
structure: Character faces pressure to decide future path
Character experiences anxiety about unknown outcome
Character acknowledges fear while planning
Character commits to path with acceptance of uncertainty
groep7-8.description: A teenager navigates choices about their future with both hope and realism.

groep7-8.name: Relationship Maturity
structure: Character is in or beginning romantic relationship
Character navigates communication and boundaries
Character faces challenge requiring maturity
Character grows in understanding of healthy relationships
groep7-8.description: A teenager learns what healthy relationships require beyond attraction.

groep7-8.name: Mental Health Awareness
structure: Character or someone close experiences mental health challenge
Character initially doesn't recognize or understand it
Character learns about mental health realities
Character develops compassion and seeks help appropriately
groep7-8.description: A teenager learns to recognize and support mental health needs.

groep7-8.name: Privilege Awareness
structure: Character realizes advantages they take for granted
Character feels guilt or defensiveness
Character resists becoming paralyzed by guilt
Character channels awareness into positive action
groep7-8.description: A teenager recognizes their privilege and decides how to use it responsibly.

groep7-8.name: Cultural Identity
structure: Character navigates multiple cultural identities
Character feels pressure to choose or conform
Character explores what each culture means to them
Character integrates multiple parts of heritage
groep7-8.description: A teenager honors multiple parts of their cultural heritage.

groep7-8.name: Resilience & Adversity
structure: Character faces significant hardship or loss
Character experiences grief, despair, or anger
Character finds small reasons to continue
Character discovers inner strength and support systems
groep7-8.description: A teenager discovers their capacity to endure and eventually transcend difficulty.
